slide03.title: DevOps manages software delivery; AgenticOps manages AI production and continuous improvement
slide03.evidenceTitle: Industry evidence for the paradigm shift
slide03.evidenceLead: Open assets expanded from code to models, data and agents; production systems moved from delivery to continuous operations.
slide03.foot: DevOps industrialized software delivery; AgenticOps industrializes intelligent-system production and evolution

milestone.3: Models and data become new open assets
milestone.4: The DevOps business model is market-validated
milestone.5: Model distribution expands into inference, evaluation and deployment
milestone.6: AgenticOps connects assets, agents and operations
